stemHtml:
Refer to figure.
What is meant by the given times in the column called evening civil twilight?

options.a: 17:53 UTC, start of evening civil twilight.
options.b: 17:53 UTC, end of evening civil twilight.
options.c: 17:53 LMT, start of evening civil twilight.
options.d: 17:53 LMT, end of evening civil twilight.
